flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at National Louis University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (61.0% → 50.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at National Louis University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (33.8% → 30.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at National Louis University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.5k → $12.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at National Louis University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.5k → $12.7k).
